---
title: "CRISPR-based gene editing"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
params:
  sample_id:
    value: x
  report_file:
    value: x
  fig:
    value: x
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: yes
    toc_float:
      collapsed: true
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

# Load libraries.
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)

# Load data.
sample_id <- params$sample_id
input_file <- params$report_file
fig_file <- params$fig

report <- read.table(input_file, header = T, sep = ",")
report$percentage <- round(report$percentage, 3)

for (i in 1:nrow(report)) {
    allele <- as.character(report[i, "allele"])
    x <- unique(unlist(strsplit(allele, "")))
    if (length(x) == 1 & x[1] == "M") {
        wild_type <- report[i, "percentage"]
    }
}

indel_rate <- 100 - wild_type

vals <- c(wild_type, indel_rate)
labels <- c("Unmodified%", "Modified%")
df <- data.frame(group = labels, percentage = vals)
```

### Indel rate.
```{r}
knitr::kable(df)
```

### Allele plot.
```{r fig.align = "center"}
knitr::include_graphics(fig_file)
```

### Allele fractions.
```{r}
knitr::kable(report)
```
